name: Saloon Pickled Eggs & Beets
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the beets and cut off the leaves, stems, and all but an inch of the root. Cut into bite-sized pieces.
2. Cook the beets until tender, then drain and peel them.
3. In a large pot or container, combine brown sugar, vinegar, cold water, salt, cinnamon sticks, and whole cloves. Bring to a boil and simmer for 10 minutes.
4. Cool the mixture before pouring it over the cooked beets.
5. Let the beets stand in the pickling liquid for at least one week, stirring occasionally.
6. Add the hard-boiled eggs to the container of pickled beets and let stand in the refrigerator for at least three days.
7. Serve on a bar or enjoy as desired.
